adminMenus.title: Menus
adminMenus.description: Manage sidebar and navigation menu items with localized labels, routes, and access permissions.

empty.title: No menus found
empty.description: Navigation menus will appear here once they are created.

stats.description: All navigation items defined in the platform

form.createDescription: Create a navigation menu item with a unique slug and at least an English label.
form.editDescription: Update the menu slug, route, and its localized labels.
form.slugHelp: Lowercase identifier used in navigation and APIs.
form.permissionsHelp: Choose which actions are required to access this menu page.
form.permissionsModuleHelp: Select the module this page belongs to, then pick one or more actions below.
form.isActiveDescription: Control whether this item appears in the sidebar for authorized users.
form.isActiveOn: This menu is visible in navigation.
form.isActiveOff: This menu is hidden from navigation.
form.label: Label

errors.sortOrderInvalid: Sort order must be a valid number.

adminEndpoints.description: View and manage API route definitions, HTTP methods, and linked permissions.

form.createDescription: Register an API route with a unique slug, HTTP method, and path.

form.slugHelp: Lowercase identifier used to reference this endpoint.
form.pathHelp: Route path as defined in the API (e.g. /api/roles).
form.permissionHelp: Optional permission required to access this endpoint.
